relevant_posts.title: How AI Is Reshaping Competitive Strategy
relevant_posts.author: Jane Smith
relevant_posts.relevance_reason: Directly relates to the student's interest in AI and real business applications, with a case study angle that invites debate.
relevant_posts.suggested_comment: This is a great example of how AI is reshaping business strategy. The parallels to Clayton Christensen's disruption theory are striking — incumbent firms often underestimate AI adoption curves until it's too late to respond. I'd be curious whether the same dynamic applies in regulated industries like healthcare or finance, where adoption barriers are structural rather than cultural.
